# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/),
and this project uses [PEP 440](https://peps.python.org/pep-0440/) version identifiers.

## [0.1.0a1] - 2024-01-15

### Added

- Experimental alpha feature gated behind the 0.1.0a1 prerelease.

## [0.0.1] - 2023-06-01

### Added

- Initial release.
